identity.name: Oyo Biz
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Trust/Clarity) with Dark Mode Toggle

primary.description: Deep Emerald - Represents Growth and Wealth

secondary.description: Terracotta/Rust - Homage to Ibadan's Brown Roofs

layout_strategies.marketing_hero: Tetris Grid: Asymmetric layout mixing Mapo Hall landmark with business portraits.
layout_strategies.directory_grid: Bento Grid: Clean, card-based layout for categories and listings. Use 'masonry' feel where possible.
layout_strategies.dashboard: High Density Grid: Sidebar navigation + dense data widgets.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-50 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium

cards.listing: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-stone-100 hover:border-emerald-100 transition-colors group cursor-pointer
cards.category: aspect-square flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-stone-50 hover:bg-emerald-50/50 border border-transparent hover:border-emerald-200 transition-all rounded-2xl

inputs.default: h-12 bg-stone-50 border-stone-200 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 rounded-lg

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons. Use 'react-icons/pi' (Phosphor) for feature icons if needed.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Avoid full-screen gradients; use subtle textures or noise if possible.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot class-variance-authority`
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the new color palette and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Update `index.css` to import the Google Fonts and set base styles.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Create the `Layout` component with the Navbar and Footer using the 'Glassmorphism' style for the Nav.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Home Page using the 'Tetris Grid' for the Hero section.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Implement the Directory/Search page with the 'Bento Grid' for listings.
